name: Feature request
about: Suggest a concrete improvement to conversion, validation, or native runtime support

## What should improve?

Describe the concrete capability you want.

## Why does it matter?

Explain the use case and what becomes possible.

## What would count as done?

List the observable behavior or test that should pass.

## Notes

Link any relevant model artifacts, Apple docs, benchmarks, or prior work.
